name: Nova Sofa Bed Without Storage
description: The Nova sofa bed without storage is a versatile piece of living room furniture that effortlessly transforms from a stylish sofa to a comfortable bed. Perfect for small spaces and guest rooms.
care_instructions: Vacuum clean fabric weekly. Avoid direct sunlight. Spot clean with mild detergent.

name: Voyager NEC Chair
description: The Voyager NEC Chair offers superior ergonomic support for long hours of work. Features adjustable armrests, lumbar support, and breathable mesh back for all-day comfort.
care_instructions: Wipe with damp cloth. Tighten screws periodically.
